name: ISEC Healthcare Ltd.
summary: ISEC Healthcare Ltd., an investment holding company, provides medical care, consultancy, treatment, and surgery services in the field of ophthalmology in Singapore, Malaysia, and Myanmar. The company operates in two segments, Specialised Health Services and General Health Services. It offers a range of specialist eye care services, including cataract and intraocular lens implant surgeries, refractive surgeries, corneal transplant surgery, adult strabismus and paediatric ophthalmology, glaucoma diagnostics and therapeutics, medical retinal diseases, uveitis, oculoplastics, facial cosmetics, and aesthetics surgeries, as well as services for vitreous and retinal diseases, external eye diseases, and optometry and orthoptics. In addition, the company offers general medical services. It operates eye care centers in Kuala Lumpur, Malacca, Penang, and Sibu. ISEC Healthcare Ltd. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Singapore. ISEC Healthcare Ltd. is a subsidiary of Aier Eye Hospital Group Co., Ltd.
